property.name: visualforcePageName
property.label: Visualforce Page Name
property.description: Enter the name of the Visualforce Page

property.name: visualforcePageTitle
property.label: Visualforce Page Title
property.description: Enter the title of the Visualforce Page

property.name: visualforcePageHeight
property.label: Visualforce Page Height
property.description: Enter the height of the Visualforce Page, default is 220
